metaTitle: High Myopia ICL | High Myopia Clinic
metaDesc: Comprehensive eye care for high myopia (-6D+). From retina, glaucoma, cataract screening to ICL surgery and lifelong management at Doctor ICL.

sec10.point0Subtit: The longer the eye, the greater the potential error.
sec10.point0Text1: Standard formulas cannot accommodate axial length variables.
sec10.point0Text2: We apply high myopia-specific IOL Calculation to bring target vision error close to zero.
sec10.point1Subtit: The optimal selection guide for sensitive eyes
sec10.point1Text1: High myopia eyes are sensitive to light scatter due to thin retinas.
sec10.point1Text2: We recommend premium lenses that minimize astigmatism correction and nighttime glare, tailored to individual characteristics.
sec10.point2Subtit:
Advanced low-stimulation protocol
to compensate for insufficient tissue durability
sec10.point2Text1:
High myopia eyes have weak structures supporting the lens,
making them susceptible to damage from even small pressure changes during surgery.
sec10.point2Text2:
Doctor ICL minimizes the burden on the capsular bag and supporting tissues
with precise low-stimulation surgical techniques,
reducing the risk of unexpected damage and secondary complications.

sec16.title: Surgery ends in 15 minutes, but data is recorded for a lifetime.
sec16.equip0Text0: TOMEY CASIA2 captures the anterior segment with high-resolution OCT to precisely examine the cornea, lens, and anterior chamber structure.
sec16.equip0Text1: Records the anterior segment structure in a non-contact manner during examination, creating objective data for structural changes before and after lens implantation.
sec16.equip0Text2: The acquired anterior segment data is used for pre-surgical baseline setting as well as post-surgical structural stability comparison and follow-up.
sec16.equip1Text0: Captures 200 degrees (approximately 80%) of the entire retina without dilation, enabling rapid examination of central and peripheral retina.
sec16.equip1Text1: Enables early diagnosis of previously undetected peripheral retinal diseases (retinal tears, degeneration, etc.).
sec16.equip1Text2: As a non-mydriatic device, there is no waiting time for dilation, and normal activities are possible immediately after examination.
sec16.equip2Text0: Spectralis OCT precisely images the retina and choroid layer by layer to identify structural changes.
sec16.equip2Text1: Repeated imaging of the same area enables accurate comparison with previous exams, with even subtle changes tracked in accumulated data.
sec16.equip2Text2: This examination is used for early detection and long-term follow-up of optic nerve and retinal diseases including glaucoma, macular degeneration, and retinal disorders.
sec16.infoTitle: Doctor ICL's Data-Based Lifelong Management System
sec16.info0Span: After lens implantation, we regularly compare and analyze not only visual acuity but also optic nerve and retinal structure.
sec16.info1Span: Even subtle structural changes related to glaucoma, macular degeneration, and retinal diseases are cumulatively managed as data.
sec16.info2Span: When data changes are detected, our medical team is the first to confirm and establish a management plan to block the top 3 blinding diseases early.
